_comment: Non-secret Crowdin configuration. Project ID is visible in Crowdin URL (https://crowdin.com/project/<slug>/settings) and is safe to commit. Auth token lives in secrets.json (gitignored).
_source_pattern_help: Path under which Crowdin stores our source files. Used by api_client.py to look up file IDs. Must match crowdin.yml's `source` paths if CLI is also used.
